summary: Replacement writer reviewed and continued Lantern's partial allowed-scope diff after the original client_engineer thread closed without handoff. The completed diff adds a static Beta audio/art/localization coverage manifest, a generated client-core fixture/read-model projection, a Coverage surface in the existing M7 guidance workspace, Storybook normal/empty/error/extreme/narrow states, SSR tests, JSON/source drift guards, Playwright flow coverage, and viewport overflow smoke evidence. This is evidence for content-lock preparation only; it does not accept formal content lock, culture-specific production assets, release commitments, manual node battle, telemetry, accounts, cloud, server, multiplayer, or new production dependencies.

tests_run.result: Modified allowed files: .storybook/WebClientShell.stories.tsx, apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.test.tsx, apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.tsx, packages/client-core/src/index.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, tests/client-core-m2-district-list.test.ts, tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts, tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx. Added allowed files: content-source/m7-audio-art-localization/beta-audio-art-localization-coverage.json, packages/client-core/src/m7-beta-audio-art-localization-content.ts, and this handoff. Unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains untouched.
Task registry listed successfully; M7-AUDIO-ART-LOCALIZATION-COMPLETE-001 remains IN_PROGRESS/client_engineer while this REVIEW handoff is pending reviewer action.
Ready list returned M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 only; audio/art/localization remains in progress until review.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for task and new content files
tests_run.result: JSON_SHAPE_OK m7.beta.audio-art-localization.coverage.v0; verified task id, manifest kind, static-resource boundary, two supported locales, eight static://m7 asset references, and historical_researcher/Human Gate routing for risk.culture-specific-assets-blocked.
VALID handoff JSON after writing this REVIEW handoff.
Content validation passed for M1 hash 4a438525, M2 hash 9ab72b0b, M3 hash 76b75849, M6 map hash 4485a353, M6 scenario hash 6d1f6d64, and M7 beta scenario/person/event set hash 92aed91e.

Vitest passed: 1 file, 21 tests. Added drift guard comparing the generated M7 audio/art/localization fixture to content-source JSON and assertions for 2 locales, 8 assets, 5 localization checks, 4 viewport smoke rows, 3 post-1.0 gaps, static resource refs, and historical_researcher/Human Gate risk routing.

Vitest SSR passed: 1 file, 11 tests. Coverage panel renders static manifest id, locale matrix, asset references, localization checks, viewport smoke, post-1.0 gaps, unresolved risks, and no WorldState/remote pipeline text.
apps/web Vitest passed: 1 file, 5 tests. Initial ?surface=coverage route renders the Coverage tab from read-model data.
Vite production build succeeded; existing >500 kB chunk warning remains.
Storybook build succeeded and cleaned .tmp/storybook-static; existing chunk-size and Storybook plugin timing warnings remain.

Playwright Chromium passed: 13 tests. Added Coverage tab assertions for locale count, asset count, zh-Hans, audio.ui.risk-warning, localization checks, viewport smoke, and risk.culture-specific-assets-blocked; M7 required viewport overflow coverage runs at 1280x720, 1280x800 text scale, 2560x1080, and 1920x1080 high-DPI.
format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture:check passed; architecture self-test produced 15 expected violations.

decisions: Reviewed Lantern's partial diff and continued its static-manifest/read-model/UI approach instead of reverting it.

Kept the implementation inside client/core/UI/web/test/content-source allowed paths; no sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, map-renderer, tools, docs, CI, roadmap, gate, PROJECT_STATUS, package.json, or pnpm-lock.yaml changes were made.
Added content-source/m7-audio-art-localization/beta-audio-art-localization-coverage.json as a Beta coverage manifest, not as formal content lock acceptance.
Projected coverage into client-core as an incremental M7 guidance read-model slice; Redux/store and React/Pixi remain non-authoritative and no WorldState is stored.
The UI consumes stable manifest, reason/source/claim IDs, review states, and route codes; it does not decide historical/cultural rules or culture-specific production choices.

Audio/art coverage remains static-reference-only with static://m7 slots and explicit no paid service, no remote pipeline, no secrets, no telemetry, no CDN/release commitment, and no new production dependency boundary.

Localization coverage records stable keys for UI chrome, tutorial, hints, encyclopedia, and content records across en-US and zh-Hans while routing final language quality and sensitive names/titles to historical_researcher.
risks: Culture-specific music, instruments, clothing, architecture, weapons, flags, scripts, religious imagery, symbols, names, titles, and transliterations remain unresolved review/Human Gate material and are not accepted by this task.
post1.audio.period-music, post1.art.clothing-architecture-symbols, and post1.voiceover-and-locale-expansion are explicitly POST_1_0_NONBLOCKING gaps before formal lock acceptance.

The new coverage manifest is static client evidence and is not currently one of the content-tools content:validate target files; this handoff includes a separate JSON shape check and client-core source/fixture drift guard.
Existing build warnings for large chunks and Storybook plugin timings remain; no new production dependency or bundle-splitting decision was introduced.
Unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains in the worktree and was not touched.
requested_action: Review the Beta audio/art/localization coverage manifest, static-resource boundary, localization matrix evidence, culture-risk routing, UI/Storybook/Playwright coverage, and unresolved post-1.0 gaps. Do not treat this REVIEW handoff as formal content lock acceptance.
